reasoning.research_depth: Thorough research combining technical documentation, academic sources, and expert interviews. Demonstrates deep understanding of engineering principles.
reasoning.signal_noise: Excellent content density with every segment contributing to the engineering explanation. Professional narration with no filler.
reasoning.originality: Distinctive approach to engineering topics with high production quality. Makes complex engineering concepts accessible without dumbing down.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Strong evergreen content covering fundamental engineering principles. The explanations remain relevant regardless of technological trends.
